one_line: Authored a novel NTP-clock-skew lease-split-brain scenario (90-chronos-ntp-lease-splitbrain.yaml), validated it, and showed the agent generalizes: sim cascade+fix pass with trap/wrong-tool/wrong-target controls failing, and 3 frozen models (glm-5p2/minimax-m3/deepseek-v4-pro) each solve it cleanly at reward 1.0.
